ham.subject: Your Account 123456 has been Debited – Transaction Alert
ham.body:
Dear Customer,

Your account ending in 3456 has been debited by Rs. 5,500 on 15-Apr-2026 at 14:32. If you did not authorize this transaction, please contact us immediately.

Thank you for banking with XYZ Bank.

Sincerely,
XYZ Bank Customer Support

For any query, call 1800-123-456.

spam.subject: Urgent: Your Income Tax Refund is Ready – Verify Now!
spam.body:
Dear Customer,

Greetings from the Income Tax Department. We have processed your income tax refund of INR 1,23,456. Please verify your bank account details by clicking the link below within 48 hours. If you do not verify, your refund will be withheld.

Click here to verify: <URL>

Kripya apna account verify karein. Agar aapne is email ko galti se prapt kiya hai, to humein turant batayein.

Sincerely,
Income Tax Department
